subject: Electrike, the Pokemon species — a small green dog-like creature with yellow lightning-bolt markings, leaping in an action pose
description: A small, green, canine-shaped creature is caught mid-leap against a fiery yellow-orange sky. Its body is lean and dynamic, with visible yellow lightning-bolt stripe markings along the sides. The mouth is open, showing energy and aggression. All four limbs are extended in a running or jumping pose. The background behind it glows with warm yellow-orange tones — atmospheric heat or electrical discharge. The foreground ground is rocky and textured. The overall mood is kinetic and charged, the creature fully committed to its outward leap.
emotion: energetic, aggressive — open mouth, fully extended leap
